notes: 7 events qualified for verification (ai-research/confidence-tagged, next 7 days from 2026-07-04): 5 Tour de France stages (Etappe 1-5), Genesis Scottish Open, Wimbledon Damefinale.

Wimbledon Damefinale: date (11 July 2026) confirmed on wimbledon.com's official schedule; exact kickoff time not republished there but corroborated by secondary sources at 16:00 BST, matching the stored 15:00 UTC, so left as confirmed.
